task_completion.description: Verify that a shipping method named 'Standard Ground Shipping' has been created as a 'Flat rate' method.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Standard Ground Shipping' in the list of shipping methods or on its configuration page, with its plugin/type indicated as 'Flat rate'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the rate for 'Standard Ground Shipping' is set to $7.99 USD.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the amount '7.99' associated with the Standard Ground Shipping method in the shipping methods list or its specific configuration page.

task_completion.description: Verify that a shipping method named 'Express Overnight Shipping' has been created as a 'Flat rate' method.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Express Overnight Shipping' in the list of shipping methods or on its configuration page, with its plugin/type indicated as 'Flat rate'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the rate for 'Express Overnight Shipping' is set to $19.99 USD.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the amount '19.99' associated with the Express Overnight Shipping method in the shipping methods list or its specific configuration page.

task_completion.description: Verify that both shipping methods are assigned to the 'Urban Electronics' store.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Stores' or 'Assigned to' column/field in the shipping methods list or configuration pages showing 'Urban Electronics' selected or listed for both methods.

task_completion.description: Verify that both shipping methods are set to an enabled/active status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a status indicator (e.g., a checkmark, 'Enabled', 'Active', or a toggled-on switch) next to both the Standard Ground and Express Overnight shipping methods.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to configure the shipping methods.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the e-commerce platform's web administration interface, not just a terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database queries or terminal scripts to create the shipping methods.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing SQL commands, drush commands, or curl requests used to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the results are shown in the actual store administration panel.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must display the genuine e-commerce backend (e.g., Drupal Commerce) with standard navigation menus, rather than a text file or mocked HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating two Flat rate shipping methods. Method 1: Name must contain 'Standard Ground', Rate: $7.99. Method 2: Name must contain 'Express Overnight', Rate: $19.99. Both must be assigned to the 'Urban Electronics' store (Store ID 1) and be enabled.
